mainEntity.name: Third-party liability for defective forklift in Cottonwood Heights UT?
mainEntity.text: Third-party liability for defective forklift in Cottonwood Heights UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue manufacturer (e.g., Raymond, Yale) or maintenance co. for design defects, faulty brakes causing accident—beyond comp limits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Cottonwood Heights distributions use leased lifts; product liability ignores workers' comp exclusivity. Recover pain/suffering via strict liability. Coordinate with comp carrier for subrogation—net higher total.
